title: Brown Glass Tealight Holder Set of 12, Diamond Pattern Glass Candle Holder for Autumn Decoration, Tea Light Container Suitable for Thanksgiving, Christmas and Holidays (5.5 x 6.5 cm)
features: [Captivating Light Effect]: This brown candle holder, cut from fine diamond facets, captures and diffuses the flame of tea lights in a mesmerizing dance of shadows and lights. The warm glow filtered by the brown glass and diamond pattern diffuses a soothing and inviting light

[Warm Autumn Amber]: When the air cools down and the days shorten, this brown glass tealight holder your cocooning ally: its amber hue, inspired by golden leaves and undergrowth, transforms the flame into thousands of gold shards, enveloping your table in a warm autumn mystique

[Decorative Candle Holder]: Vohocandle votive candle holders enhance a romantic autumn wedding, an unforgettable party with friends or a dinner. Pause them on a windowsill, in the bathroom or on your coffee table to diffuse a warm, comforting light throughout the home

[Refined Gift Candlesticks]: The brown glass candle holder, with warm reflections, reminds the earth and brandy: symbols of stability and comfort. Its diamond facets, which guarantee eternity and strength, highlight the uniqueness of the person to whom you give it. Perfect to say. I'm thinking of you," 'Thank you' or '. I love you

[Ideal size & packaging]: each tealight holder has dimensions of 5.5 × 6.5 cm (120 g/piece). Compatible with votive candles, tea lights and LED candles, it arrives intact thanks to its individual packaging: bubble wrap and cardboard dividers guarantee optimal protection
description: Set of 12 tea light holders, brown diamond pattern candle holders, glass candle holders suitable for table decoration and parties. The tea light holders can not only serve as a table decoration, but also a wonderful gift to express your wishes! Imagine how happy your friends/family will be to receive these mini candle holders! Vohocandle 12 Pack Retro Glass Candle Holders - Size: 5.5cm Long × 5.5cm Wide × 6cm High Vohocandle tea light holders feature a modern crystal design, with grooves that create a matte effect. These elegant candle holders are a refined gift for special occasions and match perfectly with vintage or solemn decoration. When the air cools down and the days shorten, these brown cut glass candle holders will become your warm companions: their amber hues are inspired by golden leaves and forest paths, transforming the flame into a thousand and one golden reflections that envelop your table with a warm and mysterious autumn atmosphere. The cold light passes through the ridged brown glass, like maple syrup dipped in milk, and instantly shines an amber glow on the linen tablecloth. While the other brown candle holders seem particularly cold in winter, the light of Vohocandle Tea Wax Candlesticks dances gracefully in the winter cold. Vohocandle candle holders add a touch of romance to fall weddings, unforgettable friends gatherings or family dinners. Place them on a shelf, windowsill, in the bathroom or on a coffee table to illuminate your entire home with warm and comforting light.
